layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The Subject Items are particularly described as follows1:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: I. Items Subject to Search and Seizure

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: II. Review of ESI on the Subject Items

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Attachment A

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: • A black iPhone with IMEI number 357201093322785, which was seized from

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: MSpeil Aent Ke Mayuiref

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Law enforcement personnel (who may include, in addition to law enforcement officers and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: agents, attormeys for the government, attorney support staff, agency personnel assisting the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: government in this investigation, and outside technical experts under government control) are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: authorized to review the ESI contained on the Subject Items for evidence, fruits, and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: instrumentalities of violations of Title 18, United States Code, Sections 1591 (sex trafficking of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: minors), and 371 (sex trafficking conspiracy) (the "Subject Offenses") described as follows:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any documents or communications with or regarding victims or potential victims

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the Subject Offenses;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 3.Any nude, partially nude, or sexually suggestive photographs of individuals who

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: appear to be teenage girls, or younger;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Records, data, or other items that evidence ownership, control, or use of, or access

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to the Subject Items, including, but not limited to access history data, historical location data,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1 To the extent that the Subject Items contain any SD cards or other removable storage media, the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: description of each such item encompasses those SD cards and other media.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any photographs of victims or potential victims of the Subject Offenses;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In conducting this review, law enforcement personnel may use various techniques to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determine which files or other ESI contain evidence or fruits of the Subject Offenses. Such

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: techniques may include, for example:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: surveying directories or folders and the individual files they'contain(analogous to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: looking at the outside of a file cabinet for the markings it contains and opening a drawer

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: believed to contain pertinent files);

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: conducting a file-by-file review by "opening" or reading the first few "pages" of such

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: files in order to determine their precise contents (analogous to performing a cursory

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: examination of each document in a file cabinet to determine its relevance);

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performing electronic keyword searches through all electronic storage areas to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determine the existence and location of data potentially related to the subject matter of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the investigation; and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: As to Subject Item-1 and Subject Item-2, Law enforcement personnel (who may include,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in addition to law enforcement oficers and agents, attorneys for the government, attorney support

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: staff, agency personnel assisting the government in this investigation, and outside technical experts

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: under government control) are further authorized to review the ESI contained on Subject Item-1

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and Subject Item-2 for evidence, fruits, and instrumentalities of violations of Title 18, United

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: States Code, Sections 1591 (sex trafficking of minors), and 371 (sex trafficking conspiracy) (the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "Subject Offenses'") described as follows:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: configuration files,saved usermames and passwords,， user profiles,e-mail contacts,and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: photographs;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any child erotica, defined as suggestive visual depictions of nude minors that do

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: not constitute child pomography as defined by 18 U.S.C. $ 2256(8).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any documents or communications with or regarding co-conspirators in the Subject

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Off enses.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "scanning"”storage areas to discover and possibly recover recently deleted data or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: deliberately hidden files; and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: •reviewing metadata,system infomation,configurationfiles,registy data,and any

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: other information reflecting how, when, and by whom the computer was used.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Law enforcement personnel will make reasonable efforts to search only for files,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: documents, or other electronically stored information within the categories identified in Section II

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of this Attachment. However, law enforcement personnel are authorized to conduct a complete

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: review of al the ESI from seized devices or storage media if necessary to evaluate its contents and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to locate all data responsive to the warrant.
